ADD OR CHANGE PRODUCT PHOTOS

1. Copy your photo into this folder.
   Example: apex-tv.jpg

2. Open data/products.js.

3. Add an image property to that product:
   image: './assets/products/apex-tv.jpg',

Example:
{ id: 'el-1', name: 'ApexView TV', image: './assets/products/apex-tv.jpg', ... }

Recommended:
- JPG, PNG or WebP
- Square image (800 x 800 or larger)
- White or light background
- Keep filenames lowercase without spaces

To change a photo, replace the file using the same filename or update the image path in products.js.
If image is omitted, SHOPORA uses its existing generated visual.
